title: Bar associations can't punish lawyers who appear in court amid boycott calls: Tripura High Court
description: The High Court of Tripura recently held that bar associations cannot penalise a lawyer for appearing in court despite a boycott call by the bar body [Sampad Choudhury v State Of Tripura & Ors.]Justice T Amarnath Goud made the observation while granting interim relief to a junior advocate who faced suspension and disciplinary action from Tripura Bar Association for discharging his professional duties.In a verdict passed on May 11, the Court noted that the concerned lawyer was suspended for ap
